context: Name of the to be translated language
%s will be replaced with the title of the screen (Example: Library Screen)
Pronunciation for a period inside of a URL, as in "www dot microsoft dot com"
This is the name of the popup that appears when a player gets a notification for a game invite or achievement unlocked

source_string: Do you want to sign out and switch accounts?
translation: Želite se odjaviti i promijeniti račun?

source_string: Power a furnace with a kelp block

translation: Željezo se kuje dok je vruće

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
Use planks and sticks to make a hoe
translation: Iskoristi daske i štapove za napraviti motika

source_string: Use planks and sticks to make a pickaxe
translation: Iskoristi daske i štapove za napraviti kramp

source_string: Use planks and sticks to make a sword
translation: Iskoristi daske i štapove za napraviti mač

source_string: Destroy a Ghast with a fireball

translation: Koristi "@p" za ciljanje na najbližeg igrača

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Samo operatori u kreativnom načinu mogu izvršavati naredbe

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Naredbeni blokovi nisu omogućeni na ovom poslužitelju

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Oprez! Knjigu nije moguće uređivati nakon potpisa.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Jeste li sigurni da želite otvoriti ovu stranicu?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Želite li otvoriti ovu poveznicu u pregledniku ili je kopirati u međuspremnik?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Nikad ne otvarajte poveznice ljudi kojima ne vjerujete!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: Pogrešna IP adresa ili nepoznat igrač

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Prilagođena traka zdravlja %s trenutno nema igrača

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Izmjena nije učinjena. Igrač nije operator

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Izmjena nije učinjena. Igrač je već operator
Nije moguće postaviti lokalnu igru za više igrača

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: Točka stvaranja postavljena na %s, %s, %s [%s] u %s za %s

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Meta ili već ima oznaku ili ima previše oznaka

source_string: Target does not have this tag
Failed to connect to the server

translation: Dodatne napredne postavke (Samo za iskusne korisnike!)

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Inače, možeš koristiti i ove predloške!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Želiš podijeliti svoj podešeni svijet s nekime? Koristi opciju ispod!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
%1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s se zabio/la u kaktus bježeći od %2$s

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block

translation: %1$s je ušetao/la u vatru boreći se s %2$s

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s je pokušao/la plivati u lavi bježeći od %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: %1$s je završio/la reš-pečen(a) boreći se s %2$s

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
%1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
%1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: %1$s je pao/la predaleko i %2$s ga/ju je dovršio/la

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s je pao/la predaleko i %2$s ga/ju je dovršio/la koristeći %3$s

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: Jeste li sigurni da želite izaći?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Ovaj će demo trajati pet Minecraft dana. Daj sve od sebe!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Prešao si svoj peti dan, upotrijebi %s kako bi spremio snimku zaslona svog uratka.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Ovaj će demo trajati 5 Minecraft dana (oko 1 sat i 40 minuta stvarnog vremena). Provjeri napretke za pomoć! Zabavi se!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Demo vrijeme je isteklo. Kupi igru kako bi nastavio ili stvori novi svijet!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Jeste li sigurni da želite zaključati težinu ovoga svijeta? Ovo će svijet staviti na %1$s zauvijek, i nikada nećete moći to promijeniti.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Nevažeća sesija (Probajte ponovno pokrenuti igru i pokretač)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Poslužitelj za provjeru autentičnosti trenutno nije dostupan. Molim te, pokušaj ponovno.
Izbačen zbog pretjerane količine poslanih poruka

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: Jesi li siguran da želiš ukloniti ovaj poslužitelj?

Light Gray Per Bend Sinister Inverted

translation: Ovaj poslužitelj preporučuje korištenje posebnih resursa.

source_string: Would you like to download and install it automagically?
translation: Želiš li ih automagično preuzeti i instalirati?

source_string: Language translations may not be 100% accurate
translation: Prijevodi na druge jezike nekada nisu 100%% točni

translation: Predmet se ne može nadograditi na taj način

translation: Napomena: Usluga Remix3D Upload više nije dostupna, umjesto toga upotrijebite Export za lokalno spremanje.

source_string: Prefix, %s%2$s again %s and %1$s lastly %s and also %1$s again!
translation: Prefiks, %s%2$s opet %s i %1$s na kraju %s te %1$s opet!

Excessive gaming may interfere with normal daily life
translation: Pretjerano igranje može ući u vašu dnevnu rutinu
